subcodes.first_line: O spiritually attracted leaf! At this time when the divine call and the summons of awakening from the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه روحانی در اینوقت که ندای الهی و صلای بیداری از ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
